name: Coconut Cocoa Drops
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the sugar, butter, egg, vanilla, and brandy/mint extract until smooth.
2. In a separate bowl, mix the flour, cocoa, salt, and baking powder.
3. Add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture alternately with the sour cream, stirring gently after each addition.
4. Stir in the shredded coconut.
5. Drop teaspoonfuls of dough onto a greased cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 12-15 minutes.
7. Cool on a rack.
